name: snooker-sim
description: Event-driven 2D snooker physics — faithful two-phase (slide→roll) ball motion with cue spin, built on the carrom-js analytic engine. Pure ES6, no dependencies.

scripts.test:online: node --test tools/relay-smoke.mjs tools/net-smoke.mjs tools/draughts-online-smoke.mjs tools/chess-online-smoke.mjs tools/backgammon-online-smoke.mjs tools/othello-online-smoke.mjs tools/connect4-online-smoke.mjs tools/cue-online-smoke.mjs tools/auth-smoke.mjs
